title: bartlettina campii
intro: Bartlettina campii, also known as Cimarrón, is a plant species native to the Americas and is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Bartlettina campii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
